messages.content:
Subject: Initial Inquiry: 2016 Nissan Altima

Hi Michael,

I hope you are having a good week. I am reaching out on behalf of Jon Clark, the seller of the vehicle, regarding the 2016 Nissan Altima.

I want to make sure this is a good fit before we proceed. Could you please share the vehicle's full service history and any known repairs or major mechanical work done recently? Also, I noticed the KBB value range is $10,990–$12,540, and the asking price is $12,600.

I want to ensure this sale is a good fit for everyone involved. Is this price fair based on the condition and history? If there are any issues I need to know about, I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss them further.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Jon Clark
Buyer Agent

<DEAL_NOT_REACHED>
